Name: Swordfish Message Registry for StorageConnections.
Description: This registry defines the event messages for Swordfish Connection usage.

ConnectionMappingAdded.Description: Indicates that a new connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been added to the Connection.
ConnectionMappingAdded.LongDescription: Indicates that a new connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been added to the Connection.
ConnectionMappingAdded.Message: Connection mapping for Volume `%1` has been added.
ArgDescriptions: The ID of the Volume related to the Connection.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the ID of the Volume that has been added to the Connection.

ConnectionMappingRemoved.Description: Indicates that a connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been removed from the Connection.
ConnectionMappingRemoved.LongDescription: Indicates that a connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been removed from the Connection.
ConnectionMappingRemoved.Message: Connection mapping for Volume `%1` has been removed.
ArgDescriptions: The ID of the Volume related to the Connection.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the ID of the Volume that has been removed from the Connection.

ConnectionMappingModified.Description: Indicates that a connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been modified on the Connection.
ConnectionMappingModified.LongDescription: Indicates that a connection mapping (VolumeInfo entry) has been modified on the Connection.
ConnectionMappingModified.Message: Connection mapping for Volume `%1` has been modified.
ArgDescriptions: The ID of the Volume related to the Connection.
ArgLongDescriptions: This argument shall contain the ID of the Volume that has been modified on the Connection.
